title: Director, Tiny Tigers Academy Early Childhood Center
notes: Festus R-VI (Jefferson Co., ~3,400 students). Dr. Samantha Mouser directs the Tiny Tigers Academy Early Childhood Center (opened 2022) - the dedicated district ECE program. Curriculum is Project Construct Model aligned to Missouri Early Learning Standards. Backup curriculum lead: Dr. Denise Funston, Assistant Superintendent of Teaching & Learning (hired 7/1/2024, formerly Windsor). Superintendent Dr. Nicki Ruess. Email needed - check Apollo (festus.k12.mo.us domain, likely smouser@). Strong outreach target - new ECE center indicates curriculum/budget activity.
